798d71ae-178b-4f6b-bd3d-c3b58bd2013b.name: ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning)
798d71ae-178b-4f6b-bd3d-c3b58bd2013b.summary: Operational backbone: orders, procurement, inventory, MPS/MRP, and finance. Food-specific capabilities include recipe/formula management, catch weight support, FEFO, lot traceability, and by-product handling.

3628303b-f98e-4dc6-8627-9ad94b5af3dd.name: MES (Manufacturing Execution System)
3628303b-f98e-4dc6-8627-9ad94b5af3dd.summary: Sits between ERP planning and the plant floor: electronic batch records, work order management, equipment status/downtime, quality data capture (CCP monitoring), OEE tracking, and PLC integration.

39da6cf5-44d6-44d3-b613-d86a3530a7b1.name: WMS (Warehouse Management System)
39da6cf5-44d6-44d3-b613-d86a3530a7b1.summary: Manages receiving/putaway, FEFO-based picking and replenishment, inventory counts, in-warehouse lot tracking, and shipping.

06ff688b-147f-4fde-846c-35ad49d333bc.name: QMS / Food Safety Software
06ff688b-147f-4fde-846c-35ad49d333bc.summary: HACCP plan management, CCP monitoring, CAPA, document/records control, internal audit, and supplier management.

0aa50349-ec76-4ea4-b24d-bd61159fff84.name: LIMS (Laboratory Information Management System)
0aa50349-ec76-4ea4-b24d-bd61159fff84.summary: Manages sample intake, test result capture, and comparison against specification limits for micro, chemical, and physical testing.

73835e3c-9d70-49bf-b855-e25139be8426.name: Supplier Management / Portal
73835e3c-9d70-49bf-b855-e25139be8426.summary: Supplier qualification, document collection (audits, certifications, specs), COA intake, and ongoing monitoring workflows.

22e46c8f-cf7e-4d53-b5f2-56c939ee76ff.name: Traceability Platform
22e46c8f-cf7e-4d53-b5f2-56c939ee76ff.summary: Dedicated lot-genealogy and CTE/KDE capture, particularly for FSMA 204 compliance; often EPCIS-based.

e7cf071d-ca71-42ea-81de-4924de27f07c.name: Label Management Software
e7cf071d-ca71-42ea-81de-4924de27f07c.summary: Label creation, compliance review, artwork version control, and approval workflow, ideally linked to the formulation/recipe database.

7e49ad00-a211-4140-a869-d669d929d49e.name: Production Scheduling System
7e49ad00-a211-4140-a869-d669d929d49e.summary: Optimizes the production schedule across equipment capacity, changeover time (including allergen changeovers), raw material availability, shelf life, and delivery deadlines. Often integrated with ERP.

d08beab6-1d89-42e5-8f51-c12ddc9dcc93.name: Formulation / Recipe Management System
d08beab6-1d89-42e5-8f51-c12ddc9dcc93.summary: Maintains version-controlled BOMs/recipes as the source of truth for nutrition calculation, allergen content, and MRP.

0895906c-34f8-43a0-a4d8-112d3a9eb395.name: EDI (via VAN or AS2)
0895906c-34f8-43a0-a4d8-112d3a9eb395.summary: Computer-to-computer exchange of standard business documents (850 PO, 855 PO Ack, 856 ASN, 810 Invoice, 940/945 warehouse orders) between trading partners, via a Value Added Network or direct AS2 connection.
